classObjective: Identify the included angle and apply the SAS Congruence Postulate correctly.
workedExamples: 14-3, Example 3 — Write Proofs Using the SAS Postulate
warmUp: In the statement 'AB, BC form angle B' — is angle B the included angle?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: identifying included angle between two sides; SAS with parallel lines for angle pairs; reflexive property for shared sides
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice identifying included angles and applying SAS correctly
independentPractice: Practice problems writing SAS proofs and identifying the included angle in given side pairs
assessment: Exit ticket: identify the included angle between sides AB and BC, then use SAS to prove triangles congruent
capReflection: Why does the angle in SAS have to be the included angle between the two sides?
